benchmarks.name: Collatz Conjecture
benchmarks.logos_source:
## To native args () -> Seq of Text
## To native parseInt (s: Text) -> Int

## Main
Let arguments be args().
Let n be parseInt(item 2 of arguments).
Let mutable total be 0.
Let mutable i be 1.
While i is at most n:
    Let mutable k be i.
    While k is not 1:
        If k % 2 equals 0:
            Set k to k / 2.
        Otherwise:
            Set k to 3 * k + 1.
        Set total to total + 1.
    Set i to i + 1.
Show total.

benchmarks.name: Sieve of Eratosthenes
benchmarks.logos_source:
## To native args () -> Seq of Text
## To native parseInt (s: Text) -> Int

## To sieve (limit: Int) -> Int:
    Let mutable flags be a new Seq of Bool.
    Let mutable i be 0.
    While i is at most limit:
        Push false to flags.
        Set i to i + 1.
    Let mutable count be 0.
    Set i to 2.
    While i is at most limit:
        If item (i + 1) of flags equals false:
            Set count to count + 1.
            Let mutable j be i * i.
            While j is at most limit:
                Set item (j + 1) of flags to true.
                Set j to j + i.
        Set i to i + 1.
    Return count.

## Main
Let arguments be args().
Let limit be parseInt(item 2 of arguments).
Show sieve(limit).

benchmarks.name: Primes (Trial Division)
benchmarks.logos_source:
## To native args () -> Seq of Text
## To native parseInt (s: Text) -> Int

## Main
Let arguments be args().
Let n be parseInt(item 2 of arguments).
Let mutable count be 0.
Let mutable i be 2.
While i is at most n:
    Let mutable isPrime be 1.
    Let mutable d be 2.
    While d * d is at most i:
        If i % d equals 0:
            Set isPrime to 0.
            Break.
        Set d to d + 1.
    If isPrime equals 1:
        Set count to count + 1.
    Set i to i + 1.
Show count.

benchmarks.name: Histogram
benchmarks.logos_source:
## To native args () -> Seq of Text
## To native parseInt (s: Text) -> Int

## Main
Let arguments be args().
Let n be parseInt(item 2 of arguments).
Let mutable counts be a new Seq of Int.
Let mutable idx be 0.
While idx is less than 1000:
    Push 0 to counts.
    Set idx to idx + 1.
Let mutable seed be 42.
Let mutable i be 0.
While i is less than n:
    Set seed to (seed * 1103515245 + 12345) % 2147483648.
    Let v be ((seed / 65536) % 32768) % 1000.
    Set item (v + 1) of counts to (item (v + 1) of counts) + 1.
    Set i to i + 1.
Let mutable maxFreq be 0.
Let mutable maxIndex be 0.
Let mutable distinct be 0.
Set i to 0.
While i is less than 1000:
    If item (i + 1) of counts is greater than 0:
        Set distinct to distinct + 1.
    If item (i + 1) of counts is greater than maxFreq:
        Set maxFreq to item (i + 1) of counts.
        Set maxIndex to i.
    Set i to i + 1.
Show "" + maxFreq + " " + maxIndex + " " + distinct.

benchmarks.name: Bubble Sort
benchmarks.logos_source:
## To native args () -> Seq of Text
## To native parseInt (s: Text) -> Int

## Main
Let arguments be args().
Let n be parseInt(item 2 of arguments).
Let mutable arr be a new Seq of Int.
Let mutable seed be 42.
Let mutable i be 0.
While i is less than n:
    Set seed to (seed * 1103515245 + 12345) % 4294967296.
    Push (seed / 65536) % 32768 to arr.
    Set i to i + 1.
Set i to 0.
While i is less than n - 1:
    Let mutable j be 1.
    While j is at most n - 1 - i:
        Let a be item j of arr.
        Let b be item (j + 1) of arr.
        If a is greater than b:
            Set item j of arr to b.
            Set item (j + 1) of arr to a.
        Set j to j + 1.
    Set i to i + 1.
Show item 1 of arr.

benchmarks.name: Matrix Multiply
benchmarks.logos_source:
## To native args () -> Seq of Text
## To native parseInt (s: Text) -> Int

## Main
Let arguments be args().
Let n be parseInt(item 2 of arguments).
Let mutable a be a new Seq of Int.
Let mutable b be a new Seq of Int.
Let mutable c be a new Seq of Int.
Let mutable i be 0.
While i is less than n:
    Let mutable j be 0.
    While j is less than n:
        Push (i * n + j) % 100 to a.
        Push (j * n + i) % 100 to b.
        Push 0 to c.
        Set j to j + 1.
    Set i to i + 1.
Set i to 0.
While i is less than n:
    Let mutable k be 0.
    While k is less than n:
        Let mutable j be 0.
        While j is less than n:
            Let idx be i * n + j + 1.
            Set item idx of c to (item idx of c + item (i * n + k + 1) of a * item (k * n + j + 1) of b) % 1000000007.
            Set j to j + 1.
        Set k to k + 1.
    Set i to i + 1.
Let mutable checksum be 0.
Set i to 1.
While i is at most n * n:
    Set checksum to (checksum + item i of c) % 1000000007.
    Set i to i + 1.
Show checksum.

benchmarks.name: Prefix Sum
benchmarks.logos_source:
## To native args () -> Seq of Text
## To native parseInt (s: Text) -> Int

## Main
Let arguments be args().
Let n be parseInt(item 2 of arguments).
Let mutable arr be a new Seq of Int.
Let mutable seed be 42.
Let mutable i be 0.
While i is less than n:
    Set seed to (seed * 1103515245 + 12345) % 2147483648.
    Push ((seed / 65536) % 32768) % 1000 to arr.
    Set i to i + 1.
Set i to 2.
While i is at most n:
    Set item i of arr to (item i of arr + item (i - 1) of arr) % 1000000007.
    Set i to i + 1.
Show item n of arr.

benchmarks.name: Iterative Fibonacci
benchmarks.logos_source:
## To native args () -> Seq of Text
## To native parseInt (s: Text) -> Int

## Main
Let arguments be args().
Let n be parseInt(item 2 of arguments).
Let mutable a be 0.
Let mutable b be 1.
Let mutable i be 0.
While i is less than n:
    Let temp be b.
    Set b to (a + b) % 1000000007.
    Set a to temp.
    Set i to i + 1.
Show a.

benchmarks.name: Loop Sum
benchmarks.logos_source:
## To native args () -> Seq of Text
## To native parseInt (s: Text) -> Int

## Main
Let arguments be args().
Let n be parseInt(item 2 of arguments).
Let mutable sum be 0.
Let mutable i be 1.
While i is at most n:
    Set sum to (sum + i) % 1000000007.
    Set i to i + 1.
Show sum.

benchmarks.name: 0/1 Knapsack
benchmarks.logos_source:
## To native args () -> Seq of Text
## To native parseInt (s: Text) -> Int

## Main
Let arguments be args().
Let n be parseInt(item 2 of arguments).
Let capacity be n * 5.
Let mutable weights be a new Seq of Int.
Let mutable vals be a new Seq of Int.
Let mutable i be 0.
While i is less than n:
    Push (i * 17 + 3) % 50 + 1 to weights.
    Push (i * 31 + 7) % 100 + 1 to vals.
    Set i to i + 1.
Let cols be capacity + 1.
Let mutable prev be a new Seq of Int.
Set i to 0.
While i is less than cols:
    Push 0 to prev.
    Set i to i + 1.
Set i to 0.
While i is less than n:
    Let mutable curr be a new Seq of Int.
    Let wi be item (i + 1) of weights.
    Let vi be item (i + 1) of vals.
    Let mutable w be 0.
    While w is at most capacity:
        Let mutable best be item (w + 1) of prev.
        If w is at least wi:
            Let take be item (w - wi + 1) of prev + vi.
            If take is greater than best:
                Set best to take.
        Push best to curr.
        Set w to w + 1.
    Set prev to curr.
    Set i to i + 1.
Show item (capacity + 1) of prev.

benchmarks.name: Coin Change
benchmarks.logos_source:
## To native args () -> Seq of Text
## To native parseInt (s: Text) -> Int

## Main
Let arguments be args().
Let n be parseInt(item 2 of arguments).
Let mutable coinList be a new Seq of Int.
Push 1 to coinList.
Push 5 to coinList.
Push 10 to coinList.
Push 25 to coinList.
Push 50 to coinList.
Push 100 to coinList.
Let mutable dp be a new Seq of Int.
Push 1 to dp.
Let mutable i be 1.
While i is at most n:
    Push 0 to dp.
    Set i to i + 1.
Let mutable c be 1.
While c is at most 6:
    Let coin be item c of coinList.
    Let mutable j be coin.
    While j is at most n:
        Set item (j + 1) of dp to (item (j + 1) of dp + item (j - coin + 1) of dp) % 1000000007.
        Set j to j + 1.
    Set c to c + 1.
Show item (n + 1) of dp.

benchmarks.name: GCD Sum
benchmarks.logos_source:
## To native args () -> Seq of Text
## To native parseInt (s: Text) -> Int

## To gcd (a: Int, b: Int) -> Int:
    Let mutable x be a.
    Let mutable y be b.
    While y is greater than 0:
        Let temp be y.
        Set y to x % y.
        Set x to temp.
    Return x.

## Main
Let arguments be args().
Let n be parseInt(item 2 of arguments).
Let mutable sum be 0.
Let mutable i be 1.
While i is at most n:
    Let mutable j be i.
    While j is at most n:
        Set sum to sum + gcd(i, j).
        Set j to j + 1.
    Set i to i + 1.
Show sum.

benchmarks.name: Graph BFS
benchmarks.logos_source:
## To native args () -> Seq of Text
## To native parseInt (s: Text) -> Int

## Main
Let arguments be args().
Let n be parseInt(item 2 of arguments).
Let mutable adj be a new Seq of Int.
Let mutable adjStarts be a new Seq of Int.
Let mutable adjCounts be a new Seq of Int.
Let mutable i be 0.
While i is less than n:
    Push i * 5 to adjStarts.
    Push 0 to adjCounts.
    Push 0 to adj. Push 0 to adj. Push 0 to adj. Push 0 to adj. Push 0 to adj.
    Set i to i + 1.
Let mutable primes be a new Seq of Int.
Push 31 to primes. Push 37 to primes. Push 41 to primes. Push 43 to primes. Push 47 to primes.
Let mutable offsets be a new Seq of Int.
Push 7 to offsets. Push 13 to offsets. Push 17 to offsets. Push 23 to offsets. Push 29 to offsets.
Let mutable p be 1.
While p is at most 5:
    Set i to 0.
    While i is less than n:
        Let neighbor be (i * item p of primes + item p of offsets) % n.
        If neighbor is not i:
            Let start be item (i + 1) of adjStarts.
            Let cnt be item (i + 1) of adjCounts.
            Set item (start + cnt + 1) of adj to neighbor.
            Set item (i + 1) of adjCounts to cnt + 1.
        Set i to i + 1.
    Set p to p + 1.
Let mutable queue be a new Seq of Int.
Let mutable dist be a new Seq of Int.
Set i to 0.
While i is less than n:
    Push 0 - 1 to dist.
    Set i to i + 1.
Push 0 to queue.
Set item 1 of dist to 0.
Let mutable front be 1.
While front is at most length of queue:
    Let v be item front of queue.
    Let start be item (v + 1) of adjStarts.
    Let cnt be item (v + 1) of adjCounts.
    Let mutable e be 0.
    While e is less than cnt:
        Let u be item (start + e + 1) of adj.
        If item (u + 1) of dist equals 0 - 1:
            Set item (u + 1) of dist to item (v + 1) of dist + 1.
            Push u to queue.
        Set e to e + 1.
    Set front to front + 1.
Let mutable reachable be 0.
Let mutable totalDist be 0.
Set i to 0.
While i is less than n:
    If item (i + 1) of dist is at least 0:
        Set reachable to reachable + 1.
        Set totalDist to totalDist + item (i + 1) of dist.
    Set i to i + 1.
Show "" + reachable + " " + totalDist.

benchmarks.name: N-Queens
benchmarks.logos_source:
## To native args () -> Seq of Text
## To native parseInt (s: Text) -> Int

## To solve (row: Int, cols: Int, diag1: Int, diag2: Int, n: Int) -> Int:
    If row equals n:
        Return 1.
    Let all be (1 shifted left by n) - 1.
    Let mutable available be all and not (cols or diag1 or diag2).
    Let mutable count be 0.
    While available is not 0:
        Let bit be available and (0 - available).
        Set available to available xor bit.
        Set count to count + solve(row + 1, cols or bit, (diag1 or bit) shifted left by 1, (diag2 or bit) shifted right by 1, n).
    Return count.

## Main
Let arguments be args().
Let n be parseInt(item 2 of arguments).
Show solve(0, 0, 0, 0, n).

benchmarks.name: Fannkuch Redux
benchmarks.logos_source:
## To native args () -> Seq of Text
## To native parseInt (s: Text) -> Int

## Main
Let arguments be args().
Let n be parseInt(item 2 of arguments).
Let mutable perm1 be a new Seq of Int.
Let mutable count be a new Seq of Int.
Let mutable i be 0.
While i is less than n:
    Push i to perm1.
    Push 0 to count.
    Set i to i + 1.
Let mutable maxFlips be 0.
Let mutable checksum be 0.
Let mutable permCount be 0.
Let mutable r be n.
Let mutable done be 0.
While done equals 0:
    While r is greater than 1:
        Set item r of count to r.
        Set r to r - 1.
    Let mutable perm be a new Seq of Int.
    Set i to 1.
    While i is at most n:
        Push item i of perm1 to perm.
        Set i to i + 1.
    Let mutable flips be 0.
    While item 1 of perm is not 0:
        Let k be item 1 of perm + 1.
        Let mutable lo be 1.
        Let mutable hi be k.
        While lo is less than hi:
            Let tmp be item lo of perm.
            Set item lo of perm to item hi of perm.
            Set item hi of perm to tmp.
            Set lo to lo + 1.
            Set hi to hi - 1.
        Set flips to flips + 1.
    If flips is greater than maxFlips:
        Set maxFlips to flips.
    If permCount % 2 equals 0:
        Set checksum to checksum + flips.
    Otherwise:
        Set checksum to checksum - flips.
    Set permCount to permCount + 1.
    Set done to 1.
    While done equals 1:
        If r equals n:
            Set done to 2.
        Otherwise:
            Let perm0 be item 1 of perm1.
            Set i to 1.
            While i is at most r:
                Set item i of perm1 to item (i + 1) of perm1.
                Set i to i + 1.
            Set item (r + 1) of perm1 to perm0.
            Set item (r + 1) of count to (item (r + 1) of count) - 1.
            If item (r + 1) of count is greater than 0:
                Set done to 0.
            Otherwise:
                Set r to r + 1.
Show checksum.
Show maxFlips.
